basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Project Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitr.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 for Project Officer (Admin.) and Project Officer (Technical) posts on a contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: M.B.A., with at least 05 years of relevant experience, M.Tech / M.C.A with at least 10 years of relevant experience
qualification.details: Project Officer (Admin.): M.B.A., with at least 05 years of relevant experience. Project Officer (Technical): M.Tech / M.C.A with at least 10 years of relevant experience.
